name: Lemon Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the clarified butter in a sauté pan until hot.
2. Add shallots and saute until translucent.
3. Add peppercorns and brandy; ignite if desired.
4. Add white wine, lemon zest, and lemon juice; reduce by two-thirds.
5. Stir in cream; reduce by half.
6. Combine half and half with egg yolks; temper into the sauce.
7. Season to taste and strain through a sieve.
8. Finish with butter.
